'''Uulshos justice droids''' were [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]] manufactured by [[Uulshos Manufacturing/Legends|Uulshos Manufacturing]].

==History==
Justice droids were used years before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and were so successful that they were reproduced by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. They were both strong and durable, and thus reliable to use.

==Notable models==
===2-124===
One of these [[Droid/Legends|droids]] was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] assassin droid [[2-124]], that was captured by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The droid escaped and killed a number of Rebel and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] officials over the years. It was placed in [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken's]] confidential New Republic Intelligence brief listing the top fifty most dangerous beings to the New Republic.

[[File:IronKnight-NEGD.jpg|thumb|right|90px|An [[Iron Knight]] using the body of an Ulshos justice droid.]]

===Iron Knights===
Some [[Iron Knight]]s, an offshoot organization of the [[Jedi Order|Jedi]] made up of [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Shard (species)|Shards]], used modified justice droids as bodies. The combination of a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] use of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and an assassin droid's skills made them deadly combatants.

==Behind the scenes==
The justice droid's design is identical to the [[Eliminator 434-series assassin droid|Eliminator 434]] model of [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] as both are based on early concept art for [[IG-88 assassin droid/Legends|IG-88]].
